title: IA-Edit
description: A minecraft plugin that integrates WorldEdit and FAWE with custom blocks from ItemsAdder
body:
IA-Edit is a Minecraft plugin designed to bridge the gap between ItemsAdder's custom blocks and the powerful editing capabilities of WorldEdit and FastAsyncWorldEdit (FAWE).

# Key Features:
- ✅ Supports all WorldEdit & FAWE commands (like `//set`, `//replace`, `//cut`, `//copy`, `//paste`, `//undo`, `//redo` and more)
- ✅ Supports schematics with ItemsAdder blocks
- ✅ Entities like furniture can be copied with `//copy -e` & `//paste -e`
- ✅ Autocompletion for ItemsAdder blocks (itemsadder:name)

# Installation & Usage:
1. 📦 **Dependencies:** Ensure that your server has the following plugins installed:
   - [ItemsAdder](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/itemsadder.73355/)
   - [FastAsyncWorldEdit (Recommended)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/fast-async-worldedit.13932/)
2. 📥 **Installation:** Download the IA-Edit plugin and place it into your server's `plugins` directory.
3. 🔄 **Restart Server:** Restart your server to load the plugin.
